channel.title: America First - Private Feed
channel.description: Auto-generated private feed for America First
channel.itunes:author: RT

item.title: War in Iran and what it means for the future of America First — RT America First
item.description: On this premier episode of America First, Scottie Nell Hughes jumps into one of the most newsworthy events of the past decade: the war with Iran! The United States has struck the Islamic Republic of Iran, sparking vast and intense reaction from Iranians across the region

item.title: War in Iran and what it means for the future of America First — RT America First
item.description: On this premier episode of America First, Scottie Nell Hughes jumps into one of the most newsworthy events of the past decade: the war with Iran! The United States has struck the Islamic Republic of Iran, sparking vast and intense reaction from Iranians across the region
